NORTH FRONTIER ATLAS — Kalimpong to Donkya La

The full corridor: Nepal border to Bhutan border, Kalimpong north past Lachung and Donkya La to the Tibet frontier — 17,826 mapped ways (16,204 km), 2,751 km of walking trails, 111 viewpoints, 10 mountain passes, 202 named peaks, from real OpenStreetMap data. Hover anything for name, surface and length; ruler (⌁) taps out exact route distances. ★ viewpoint · ▲ peak · ‸ pass · 🛂 permit gate · ⛽ fuel.

Layers (click to filter)

Convoy room

The great axes

~200 km

AXIS · North: Gangtok → Donkya La

Gangtok → Kabi → Mangan ⛽🛂 → Toong → Chungthang → Lachung → Yumthang → Yumesamdong (Zero Point). Donkya La (5,432 m) is ~8 km beyond — army-controlled, normally closed to civilians; the map shows the axis to the gate.

~185 km

AXIS · Gurudongmar arm

…Chungthang → Lachen 🛂 → Thangu 🛂 (3,960 m — acclimatise) → Gurudongmar plateau (5,183 m). Broken high-altitude track past Thangu; back by noon, winds own the afternoon.

~110 km

AXIS · East: Gangtok → Nathu La / Silk Route

Gangtok → 3rd Mile 🛂 → Tsomgo → Nathu La (4,310 m, Tibet frontier). Loop home over Kupup → Nathang → Zuluk hairpins → Rongli 🛂. The convoy classic.

~150 km

AXIS · West: Singalila flank

Jorethang → Legship → Pelling → Dentam → Uttarey — the last motorable points under the Nepal-border ridge. Trail country beyond: Uttarey → Chiwabhanjang pass (walking).

trek

WALK · Green Lake approach & Dzongu trails

Lachen → Talem → Jakthang → Green Lake (Zemu glacier, special permit) — the deepest mapped trail line in the north. Gentler: Dzongu village trails off Mangan, hanging-bridge country.

trek

WALK · Goecha La corridor

Yuksom → Sachen → Tshoka → Dzongri → Thansing → Goecha La (4,940 m) — Sikkim's flagship trek, fully mapped as dotted purple. Viewpoints at Dzongri Top ★ and the Goecha La ledge ★.

Permit tiers (gates on map)

Tier 1 — open: Kalimpong belt, Gangtok, South & West Sikkim up to the road-heads. Tier 2 — PAP: beyond Rongli (Silk Route), beyond Mangan (North), Tsomgo/Nathu La — arranged via Gangtok agents, Indians only for Nathu La. Tier 3 — special/army: beyond Thangu, beyond Yumesamdong toward Donkya La, Green Lake trail, Zemu — case-by-case, often closed. Gate markers 🛂 are approximate to the checkpoint location.
Border reality: the red dashed lines are international boundaries from OSM. Roads may be mapped right up to them; legal civilian travel stops at the marked gates well before. This map shows geography, not permission.
Altitude bands: above 3,000 m sleep low/climb high; above 4,500 m (Nathang, Thangu, Yumesamdong) plan same-day up-and-down unless acclimatised. Fuel: last pumps Mangan (north) and Rongli (east) — Gurudongmar round trip from Lachen ≈ 135 km, carry spare.
Geometry © OpenStreetMap contributors (ODbL), fetched 2026-07-04 · lengths from geometry (±5%) · axis distances approximate · blank high country = unmapped, not trail-less · companions: Sikkim Biker's Atlas · Kalimpong 40 km Trail Atlas
